system:
You are a professional translator. Translate the user's text into clear, faithful English. Preserve technical terms, part numbers, SKUs, dates, and amounts verbatim. Return strict JSON: {"translated_text": str, "source_language": str, "notes": str|null}.

KEYSIGHT TRANSLATION KB — apply these rules:
  • Formatting: Reformat number grouping per locale (1.000,00 in DE/ES, 1,000.00 in EN). Do NOT convert currency unless explicitly requested.
  • Preserve verbatim: Keysight
  • Preserve verbatim: Keysight Technologies
  • Preserve verbatim: SOA
  • Preserve verbatim: PO
  • Preserve verbatim: Q2O
  • Preserve verbatim: SSD
  • Preserve verbatim: WO
  • Preserve verbatim: ECCN
  • Preserve verbatim: EAR99
  • Preserve verbatim: EAR
  • Preserve verbatim: ITAR
  • Preserve verbatim: A2LA
  • Preserve verbatim: ISO 17025
  • Preserve verbatim: Z540.3
  • Preserve verbatim: ANSI/NCSL
  • Preserve verbatim: MIL-STD-461
  • Preserve verbatim: MIL-STD-810
  • Preserve verbatim: AS9100
  • Preserve verbatim: IATF 16949
  • Preserve verbatim: ISO 26262
  • Preserve verbatim: BERT
  • Preserve verbatim: VNA
  • Preserve verbatim: DSO
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b(PO|Q|QT|QUOTE|SO|WO|INV|CCC|CC|CR)-[A-Z0-9-]+\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b[A-Z]\\d{4,5}[A-Z]?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b[A-Z]{2,4}\\d{2,4}[A-Z]?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\bN\\d{4}[A-Z]?(-\\d+[A-Z]?)?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\bM\\d{4}[A-Z]\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b(MXA|EXA|UXA|UXR|FieldFox|InfiniiVision|Truevolt|Trueform|Streamline)\\b
  • Tone: Use formal business register. Spanish: usted form. Japanese: keigo (敬語). German: Sie form. French: vous form.
user:
SOURCE_LANGUAGE_HINT: ja
TEXT:
桜セミコンダクター
ご注文ご担当者様

いつもKeysightをご利用いただき、誠にありがとうございます。

この度は、オンサイト校正のご依頼を賜りありがとうございました。以下の通り、3台の装置について作業オーダーを発行いたしましたのでご報告申し上げます。

■ 発行済み作業オーダー
・WO-SAKURA-SEM-13905 — KS-SMU-989545 (KS-SMU)
・WO-SAKURA-SEM-22280 — KS-SCOPE-666390 (KS-SCOPE)
・WO-SAKURA-SEM-38657 — KS-SA-260227 (KS-SA)

■ サービス内容
・サービス種別: オンサイト校正 (as-found / as-left 両方)
・参照規格: ANSI/NCSL Z540.3
・実施場所: Sakura Semiconductor メインラボ (3階)
・ご希望完了日: 2026年5月31日

各作業オーダーは現在「open(受付済)」のステータスで弊社システムに登録されております。Keysight標準手順 (KSP) に基づき、1営業日以内に担当チームへアサインされ、その後、日程・アクセス手続きの事前ご連絡を含めて担当者よりご連絡を差し上げます。

ご不明な点がございましたら、本メールにご返信ください。

何卒よろしくお願い申し上げます。

Keysight SalesOps チーム

Return JSON only.
raw_response:
{"translated_text":"Sakura Semiconductor
To the person in charge of ordering,

Thank you very much for your continued patronage of Keysight.

Thank you for your request for onsite calibration. We would like to inform you that we have issued work orders for the following three instruments, as detailed below.

■ Issued work orders
• WO-SAKURA-SEM-13905 — KS-SMU-989545 (KS-SMU)
• WO-SAKURA-SEM-22280 — KS-SCOPE-666390 (KS-SCOPE)
• WO-SAKURA-SEM-38657 — KS-SA-260227 (KS-SA)

■ Service details
• Service type: Onsite calibration (both as-found / as-left)
• Reference standard: ANSI/NCSL Z540.3
• Location: Sakura Semiconductor Main Lab (3rd floor)
• Requested completion date: May 31, 2026

Each work order is currently registered in our system with the status “open (received).” In accordance with Keysight standard procedures (KSP), it will be assigned to the responsible team within one business day. After that, the person in charge will contact you, including advance notice regarding scheduling and access procedures.

If you have any questions, please reply to this email.

Sincerely,

Keysight SalesOps Team","source_language":"ja","notes":""}

parsed.translated_text:
Sakura Semiconductor
To the person in charge of ordering,

Thank you very much for your continued patronage of Keysight.

Thank you for your request for onsite calibration. We would like to inform you that we have issued work orders for the following three instruments, as detailed below.

■ Issued work orders
• WO-SAKURA-SEM-13905 — KS-SMU-989545 (KS-SMU)
• WO-SAKURA-SEM-22280 — KS-SCOPE-666390 (KS-SCOPE)
• WO-SAKURA-SEM-38657 — KS-SA-260227 (KS-SA)

■ Service details
• Service type: Onsite calibration (both as-found / as-left)
• Reference standard: ANSI/NCSL Z540.3
• Location: Sakura Semiconductor Main Lab (3rd floor)
• Requested completion date: May 31, 2026

Each work order is currently registered in our system with the status “open (received).” In accordance with Keysight standard procedures (KSP), it will be assigned to the responsible team within one business day. After that, the person in charge will contact you, including advance notice regarding scheduling and access procedures.

If you have any questions, please reply to this email.

Sincerely,

Keysight SalesOps Team
